messages.content: translate to Chinese:802.1Q VLAN, Port Trunking, Bandwidth Management, Flow Control, Port Isolation

802.1Q VLAN -> 802.1Q虚拟局域网
Port Trunking -> 端口聚合
Bandwidth Management -> 带宽管理
Flow Control -> 流量控制
Port Isolation -> 端口隔离

802.1Q VLAN -> 802.1Q 虚拟局域网
Port Trunking -> 端口汇聚
Bandwidth Management -> 带宽管理
Flow Control -> 流量控制
Port Isolation -> 端口隔离
Ping, Traceroute, Port Loopback, SFP Digital Diagnosis

Ping -> Ping (网络连通性测试)
Traceroute -> Traceroute (路由追踪)
Port Loopback -> 端口环回测试
SFP Digital Diagnosis -> SFP数字诊断

The idea of all Open Standard Modules™ is to create a new, future proof and versatile standard for small-size, low-cost embedded computer modules, combining the following key characteristics:

Completely machine processible during soldering, assembly and testing
different possible packages for direct PCB soldering without connector
Pre-defined soft- and hardware interfaces
Open-Source in soft- and hardware
The Open Standard Module™ specification allows developing, producing and distributing embedded modules for the most popular MCU32, ARM and x86 architectures. For a growing number of IoT applications this standard helps to combine the advantages of modular embedded computing with increasing requirements regarding costs, space and interfaces.

所有Open Standard Modules™的理念是创建一个全新、面向未来且多功能的标准，用于小尺寸、低成本的嵌入式计算机模块，结合以下关键特性：

完全可在焊接、组装和测试过程中进行机器加工
具有不同可直接PCB焊接而无需连接器的封装方式
预定义的软硬件接口
软硬件开源
Open Standard Module™规范允许开发、生产和分发最流行的MCU32、ARM和x86架构的嵌入式模块。对于越来越多的物联网应用，该标准有助于结合模块化嵌入式计算的优势，并满足对成本、空间和接口的日益增长的要求。

BSP is the way to quickly support additional hardware. 
E.g., NFC reader is needed for a tablet in warehouse/prison management.

BSP (Board Support Package) is a set of device drivers, firmware, and software libraries that enable a specific hardware platform to run an operating system. It is used to provide support for additional hardware components that are not natively supported by the operating system.

In the example you mentioned, if a tablet in a warehouse or prison management system requires an NFC reader, the BSP can be customized and added to the tablet's operating system to support the NFC reader. This customization includes developing and integrating the necessary device drivers, firmware, and software libraries specific to the NFC reader hardware. Once the BSP is implemented, the tablet will be able to interact with and utilize the NFC reader for the desired functionalities.

BSP（板级支持包）是一组设备驱动程序、固件和软件库，用于使特定的硬件平台能够运行操作系统。它用于为操作系统提供对不受其原生支持的额外硬件组件的支持。

在你提到的例子中，如果一个仓库或监狱管理系统的平板电脑需要一个NFC读卡器，BSP可以根据需要进行定制，并添加到平板电脑的操作系统中以支持NFC读卡器。这个定制化过程包括开发和集成与NFC读卡器硬件相关的必要设备驱动程序、固件和软件库。一旦BSP被实施，平板电脑将能够与NFC读卡器进行交互，并利用其实现所需的功能。

translate to chinese: BSP is the way to quickly support additional hardware.
E.g., NFC reader is needed for a tablet in warehouse/prison management.

BSP（板级支持包）是快速支持额外硬件的一种方式。
例如，在仓库/监狱管理中需要一个NFC读卡器的平板电脑。

translate: Connectivity is required for most of the uses case, sometimes more than one technique is needed, BSP must support all.

As requirement change or supply issue, developers need to update the BSP for the new modules

大多数用例都需要连接性，有时需要多种技术，BSP必须支持所有这些。

随着需求的变化或供应问题，开发人员需要更新BSP以支持新模块。

translate: BSP is the easiest approach to realize customers’ requests on the system customization.
E.g., disable the drop-down menu or lock down the device in a kiosk mode.

BSP是实现系统定制化的最简单方法，以满足客户的需求。
例如，禁用下拉菜单或以展示器模式锁定设备。
